data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auditability of tier at time of access.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the auditability of the membership tier at the time of access, but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. While there are multiple passed steps related to bookings and member invitations, none of the evidence directly addresses the auditability aspect of tier access. This indicates a clear gap in the required validation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of auditability of tier at time of access.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auditability of tier at time of access.
